name: rust_float_literal_content_change
description: Test detection of floating point literal content changes in Rust code
old_code: fn calculate_area(radius: f64) -> f64 { 3.14159 * radius * radius }
new_code: fn calculate_area(radius: f64) -> f64 { 3.141592653589793 * radius * radius }

expected_changes.description: Float literal precision increased from 3.14159 to 3.141592653589793
